title: Grafix Bubble Solution Bottle 1.8 litres - Large Bubble Mixture for Bubble Machines with a Funnel Assorted Colors
features: Extra-Large Bubble Refill – This 1.8-litre bottle provides hours of fun, perfect for bubble machines, wands, and outdoor play.
Mess-Free Funnel Design – Includes an easy-pour funnel cap, making refills quick and spill-free for kids and adults.
Vibrant Bubble Solution – Assorted colours including blue, pink, green, and yellow add extra excitement to bubble play.
Safe & Non-Toxic Formula – Made for kids aged 3+, ensuring a safe and enjoyable experience for all.
Perfect for Parties & Playtime – Ideal for birthdays, playdates, and outdoor fun, creating long-lasting, high-floating bubbles.

Yes! It’s designed to work perfectly with all standard bubble machines and bubble toys. Is the funnel included? Yes, every bottle comes with an easy-pour funnel to make refilling simple and spill-free. How long does the 1.8L bottle last? It depends on usage, but typically it provides hours of continuous bubble fun or multiple machine refills. Available in 1, 2 or 4 pack. Is the bubble liquid safe for kids? Yes, it’s non-toxic and designed for outdoor family play, though it should not be ingested. Adult supervision always recommended. Can I refill smaller bubble bottles with this solution? Absolutely! The included funnel fits standard 100ml bottles for easy reuse and eco-friendly play. Grafix Bubble Solution – 1.8L Giant Bubble Fun with Easy-Pour Funnel Create hours of outdoor fun and excitement with the Grafix Bubble Solution 1.8L, designed for kids, families, and bubble enthusiasts alike! This jumbo-size bubble mixture comes complete with a handy pouring funnel for effortless refills — perfect for bubble machines, bubble wands, or traditional bubble toys. This long-lasting bubble mix delivers strong, vibrant, and long-floating bubbles, transforming any garden, park, or party into a magical bubble wonderland. Large 1.8-litre bottle: ensures endless bubble-blowing fun without frequent refills, keeping the fun going longer. Premium bubble formula: creates big, long-lasting, colourful bubbles that float beautifully through the air. Included funnel: makes refilling bubble machines and bottles quick and mess-free. Compatible with all 100ml bubble bottles: reuse, refill, and reduce waste — great for families and parties. Perfect for outdoor play: ideal for birthdays, barbecues, garden games, and summer days, encouraging kids to play outside. Available as 1,2 or 4 pack of bubble solution. Whether you’re hosting a birthday bash or just want to make playtime more magical, the Grafix Bubble Solution turns every moment into an unforgettable bubble adventure. Grafix Bubble Solution – 1.8L Refill with Funnel Brand Grafix What is it? A large-capacity 1.8-litre bubble solution for use with bubble machines, bubble wands, and refill bottles. Comes with a reusable easy-pour funnel compatible with standard 100ml bottles. Produces strong, colourful, long-lasting bubbles for outdoor fun. Size 1.8l Included 1 x 1.8L bubble solution, 1 x easy-pour funnel Available as 1 pack, 2 pack or 4 pack. Compatibility Suitable for all bubble machines and 100ml bubble bottles Age range 3 years and above Liquid Type Ready-to-use bubble solution (no dilution required) Best for Bubble Machines, Outdoor play, summer fun, parties, and garden entertainment Safety Note Non-toxic, but not for consumption. Use under adult supervision. Origins of bubble solution The modern origins of bottled bubble solution trace to 1940 when the Chemtoy company began bottling a mixture of soap and water for children, making the activity more convenient and leading to its widespread popularity.
